parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "email": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.email) }},
  "dedup_key": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.dedup_key) }},
  "name": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.name) }},
  "phone": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.phone) }},
  "company": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.company) }},
  "domain": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.domain) }},
  "message": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.message) }},
  "source": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.source) }},
  "source_campaign": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.source_campaign) }},
  "source_metadata": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.source_metadata) }},
  "enrichment": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.enrichment) }},
  "raw_json": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.raw_json) }},
  "is_demo": {{ $node["Extract Lead Data"].json.is_demo }},
  "received_at": {{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Lead Data"].json.received_at) }}
}

={
  "lead_id": "{{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.lead_id }}",
  "action": "call_now",
  "channel": "slack",
  "status": "queued",
  "idempotency_key": "{{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.lead_id }}_call_now_{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}"
}

={
  "lead_id": "{{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.lead_id }}",
  "action": "nurture_sequence",
  "channel": "email",
  "status": "queued",
  "idempotency_key": "{{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.lead_id }}_nurture_sequence_{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}"
}

={
  "lead_id": "{{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.lead_id }}",
  "score_id": "{{ $node["Insert Score"].json.id }}",
  "is_demo": {{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.is_demo || false }},
  "nurture_stage": "initial",
  "next_action_date": "{{ new Date(Date.now() + 3 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() }}",
  "action_count": 0
}

={
  "lead_id": "{{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.lead_id }}",
  "action": "manual_review",
  "channel": "none",
  "status": "queued",
  "idempotency_key": "{{ $node["Merge Lead Data"].json.lead_id }}_manual_review_{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}"
}

={
  "workflow_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.workflow_name) }},
  "lead_id": {{ $json.lead_id ? JSON.stringify($json.lead_id) : 'null' }},
  "error_message": {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message) }},
  "error_node": {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_node) }},
  "error_data": {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_data) }},
  "resolved": false
}
